title: I Want to Be an Apprentice
overview: Arte is born into a noble family, but she would rather work for a living as an artisan than be married off to another noble.

title: A New Life
overview: Arte starts her life as an apprentice by fixing up her shed and meets an apprentice named Angelo when she goes to the marketplace to buy materials.

title: First Job
overview: During Carnival, Leo takes Arte out, but it’s not to join the festivities… Then, she helps with a job for a client for the first time.

title: Courtesan
overview: Arte accompanies Leo to his courtesan patron’s house and learns about what it takes for a woman to live by her own means.

title: Inescapable Bond
overview: Arte practices negotiating with a difficult customer and ends up learning more about Leo’s past.

title: Trade Guild
overview: Apprentices from other workshops take issue with the fact that Arte is a girl, so she has to prove herself through her work.

title: The Venetian Noble
overview: A noble from Venice visits Leo’s workshop with an offer of work for Arte, but it would mean she would have to leave Florence and Leo.

title: A New Chapter
overview: Arte sets off for Venice with Yuri, but what Leo says at their parting makes her feel uneasy about her decision to leave Florence.

title: Naughty Child
overview: Arte starts her lessons with Katarina, but she needs to get Katarina to open up to her before she can do her job.

title: Katarina’s Dinner
overview: Katarina invites Arte to the dinner she prepares at Yuri’s, and Yuri tells Arte more about Katarina’s past.

title: The Faliers’ Portrait Painter
overview: An encounter at a local Venetian workshop leads Arte to work harder than ever as she finished up the Faliers’ portraits.

title: Apprentice
overview: Arte finishes the Falier portraits and returns to Florence, reuniting with her friends and family there.
